title: SACRAMENTO, CA
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Medication assisted treatment is scientifically proven to help individuals with addiction.
MAT is proven to be the most effective method for people with opioid addiction to change their lives.
These medications reduce the likelihood of dying from an opioid overdose by more than 50%.
There are 2.5 million Americans suffering from opioid addiction.
Fewer than one in ten people in the US with opioid addiction are currently enrolled in treatment.
Changing state policies on methadone treatment to follow federal guidelines will reduce barriers to care and help curb overdose deaths.
Many European countries have successfully used medication assisted treatments to address the opioid crisis for decades.
In 2022, the entire continent of Europe had only 6,100 deaths from opioid overdoses.
California alone had over 7,300 deaths from opioid overdoses in 2023.
The medication works; it’s been shown to reduce illicit drug use by a third and quadruple treatment retention.
